summary: LUMEN 2.0 Phase A1 (Unit Registry & Ownership OS) testing completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed including critical secondary transfer conservation test. Frontend: Admin registry dashboard + Ownership Explorer + Investor units view all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (cookie-based session)
Backend: Investor login (cookie-based session)
Backend: GET /api/admin/registry/summary (600000 total, 17612 issued, 582388 available, 6 assets)
Backend: GET /api/admin/registry/invariants (all_ok=true, conservation check passes)
Backend: GET /api/admin/registry/asset/{asset_id} (cap table + events)
Backend: GET /api/admin/registry/asset/{asset_id}/events (ownership events)
Backend: POST /api/admin/registry/asset/{asset_id}/snapshot (creates snapshot)
Backend: POST /api/admin/registry/asset/{asset_id}/recompute (recomputes units)
Backend: GET /api/investor/units (11410 units, 499989 UAH, 3 holdings)
Backend: GET /api/investor/units/{asset_id}/events (investor's own events)
Backend: CRITICAL - Secondary transfer conservation (performed 10000 UAH trade @ 0.97, verified invariants OK, transfer events recorded, units conserved 5208=5208)
Frontend: Admin registry dashboard loads with 4 totals tiles (600000/17612/3513/582388)
Frontend: Admin registry shows 6 asset cards with subscription bars
Frontend: Admin registry invariants pill shows 'Інваріанти OK'
Frontend: Admin Ownership Explorer opens on asset click
Frontend: Admin Ownership Explorer shows stat tiles + invariant badge
Frontend: Admin Ownership Explorer has Знімок (snapshot) button
Frontend: Admin Ownership Explorer has Перерахувати (recompute) button
Frontend: Admin Ownership Explorer back button works
Frontend: Investor units page loads with 'Мої частки' heading
Frontend: Investor units shows 3 summary tiles (11619 units, 510021 ₴, 3 assets)
Frontend: Investor units shows 3 holdings with cover images, units, %, value
Frontend: Investor units 'Історія' button opens history drawer
Frontend: Investor units history drawer shows ownership events (Купівля +6250)
